en: Wait, you hold my hand, you kiss my mouth, and you draw the line at 102 Fever?
ko: 잠깐, 너는 내 손을 잡고, 내 입에 키스하지만,

en: What happened to our love? Sheldon, are you okay?
What's going on? How'd I get here?
I don't know. We came home from work and we found you.
ko: 잘 모르겠어, 우리는 일에서 집에 돌아왔고 너를 찾았어.

en: Home from work? What time is it? It's nine o'clock.
Nine o'clock? What happened to eight and seven and all the other o'clocks?
You don't remember? Well, I remember waking up in the morning,
Amy rubbing Vicks on my chest, and her hands were like two frozen chunks of tundra.
I took some cold medicine to...
You did seem a little loopy when you showed up at the lab.
ko: 네가 연구소에 나타났을 때 좀 이상해 보였어.

en: At the lab? Why am I naked from the waist down?
